titleStmt.title: SII 9.662: original edition by R. Shama Sastry and N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 662. (A.R. No. 212 of 1913.) ON A STONE BUILT INTO THE MUD WALL IN FRONT OF THE LAKSHMINARAYANA TEMPLE AT SOMASAMUDRA, BELLARY TALUK, BELLARY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This is incomplete and dated Śaka 1478, Naḷa, Āshāḍha, śu. 11, Gu[ruvāra] corresponding to A.D. 1556 June 18, Thursday, in the reign of Sadāśivadēva-Mahārāya ruling from Vidyānagara. It records that the Mahājanas of the sarvamānya-agrhahāra Sōmasamudra made a grant of land for the service of the god Lakshmīnārāyaṇa in the village and that Nāganātha-Sōmayāji granted also some vṛittis. Sōmasamudra is stated to have been situated in Kuṟugōḍa-sīme, which was a sub-division of Mūganāḍa-vēṇṭhe in Hastināvati-vaḷita.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śubhamastu . svasti śrīvijayābhyudayaśāli
vāhanaśakavaruṣaṁgaḷu 1478 neya
naḷasaṁvatsarada Āṣāḍha śu 1 gu lu
śrīma(ṁ)nmahārājādhirāja rājaparamē
śvara śrīvīrapratāpa śrīvīrasadāsivadē
vamahārāyaru vidyānagaradallū
vajraśiṁhāsanārūḍharāgi sukhadiṁ
pruthvīrājyaṁgaiutta yiralu hastināvativa
ḷitada mūganāḍa vēṁṭheyake saluva kuṟugōḍa
sīme vaḷagaṇa sōmasamudrāveṁba sarvamā
nya Agrāhāradalu pratiṣṭheĀgi yiha la
kṣu�vonārāyaṇadēvarige mahājanagaḷu
yēkādaśī jāgara pallakkisēve tāḷamaddaḷeya
sēvege Āgi samarpisida mānya kāḍāraṁbha ho
la 2 nīrāraṁbha 2 Ubhayaṁ nāguḷada mānāvē
deya sēvege Āgi kalapakūra nārasiṁhya
bhaṭṭara makkaḷu nāganāthasōmayājiga
ḷu samarpisida vrittigaḷu �yo sōmasumudra A
grahāradalu kuṟugōḍa sēnabhōva kalaparsa
rige śāsanastavāda vritti mūṟu vrittiya
Avara hōbaḷiyiṁ munūru khaṁḍeya
yabhaṭariṁdalu lakṣu�monārāyaThe record is incomplete.
Digital edition of SII 9.662 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
